name: Abc Vegetables n' Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. In a kettle, combine chicken, onions, and bell peppers. Cook over medium-high heat, stirring occasionally, until the chicken is no longer pink.
2. Add water, tomato sauce, stewed tomatoes, chili powder, salt, and black pepper. Continue cooking, stirring occasionally, until the chili comes to a boil.
3. Add mixed vegetables and pasta. Reduce heat to medium-low. Continue cooking, stirring often, until flavors are blended, 20 minutes.
